cook_nether.title: Cook a Nether meal using Nether ingredients (campfire, smoker, or stove)

strider_meat.title: Kill a Strider and collect Strider Scales or meat

subtitle.text: Survival food for an unsurvivable dimension.

description: The Nether has food if you know where to look.
Hoglin meat is the most obvious source.
The Strider feeds on lava and tastes like smoke.
Nether cuisine is not comfort food.
It is functional food for a hostile environment.
Nether's Delight adds full cooking chains for every Nether mob.
Hoglin Loin drops from Hoglins (aggro in Crimson Forest, passive elsewhere).
Warped Moldy Meat causes Blindness + Confusion — do not eat it.
Plate of Stuffed Hoglin Snout gives 14 hunger — highest in the dimension.
→ Kill a Strider and collect its drops [check]
